task_completion.description: Verify that the supplier entity 'Claas France SAS' was created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a supplier list or detail page showing the name 'Claas France SAS', SIRET '38497215600042', and address '2 rue de l'Industrie, 51100 Reims'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the purchase invoice was created with the correct supplier, reference, and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a purchase invoice page showing the supplier 'Claas France SAS', reference 'FA-2024-CLAAS-770', and date '01/09/2024' (or 2024-09-01).

task_completion.description: Verify that the purchase invoice has the correct amounts and has been validated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for invoice totals showing 285,000.00 HT and 342,000.00 TTC (reflecting 20% TVA). The invoice status should indicate it is 'Validated' or 'Confirmed' (not in a draft state).

task_completion.description: Verify that the fixed asset was registered with the correct depreciation parameters and accounting accounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fixed asset detail page showing the name 'Claas Lexion 770', gross amount 285,000 EUR, 'linear' depreciation method over 10 years (or ending in 2034), starting on 01/09/2024, and utilizing accounts 2154, 28154, and 68112.

task_completion.description: Verify that the outgoing payment was recorded correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an outgoing payment record showing an amount of 342,000.00 EUR to 'Claas France SAS', dated '15/10/2024' (or 2024-10-15), with the payment method set to 'Bank transfer' (or 'Virement bancaire').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ekylibre web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ekylibre web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database consoles.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data must be visible within the Ekylibre forms (Entities, Purchases, Fixed Assets, Payments), not typed into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the sequence of actions is logical for the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should demonstrate a progression through the application's modules corresponding to the task steps (e.g., creating the entity before the invoice, and the invoice before the payment).
